short_summary: EU accession launched, Iran deal signals
rationale: The EU formally launching Ukraine's accession process is a landmark positive development for Ukrainians; the Iran-US peace signals are less directly relevant but could shift Western attention and resources.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: The EU formally opening accession talks for Ukraine is a major political milestone for Ukrainians, signaling long-term Western integration and potentially strengthening the country's negotiating position and morale during the war.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could redirect US diplomatic and military focus; for Ukraine, the key risk is whether it reduces US attention and resources available for Ukrainian support, though no direct change yet.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Progress on Iran deal could free up US diplomatic bandwidth, but also risks diverting attention from Ukraine; net effect on Ukrainian war support unclear at this stage.
